name: BuildBuddy
description: Managed Bazel build service providing remote execution, caching, and results UI for large monorepos.

seo.title: BuildBuddy — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: BuildBuddy: Managed Bazel build service providing remote execution, caching, and results UI for large monorepos.

when_to_use: Remote Bazel build caching for large monorepos
Distributed remote execution to parallelize Bazel builds
Build results UI with test logs and artifact browsing
Speed up CI by sharing cache across developer machines

pros: Dramatic speedups on large Bazel monorepos
Remote cache and remote execution in one service
Rich results UI with invocation history and flakiness data
Self-hosted and cloud options both available
cons: Only useful if you have already adopted Bazel
Pricing scales with build traffic, can get pricey
Steep learning curve for teams new to RBE
review.verdict: The go-to managed Bazel build service: worth every cent once your monorepo is big enough to hurt.
review.best_for: Teams on Bazel with multi-minute builds that need remote caching and execution.
review.not_for: Teams not on Bazel or with small, fast builds.

developer_experience.reason: Bazel remote exec with great docs
